title: Hosted GitHub Pages viewer must be tracked
summary: docs/viewer was ignored in .gitignore, so changes to the package viewer did not update the GitHub Pages viewer even when docs linked to viewer/. Keep docs/viewer tracked and copy the current mcp/viewer assets there when
body: docs/viewer was ignored in .gitignore, so changes to the package viewer did not update the GitHub Pages viewer even when docs linked to viewer/. Keep docs/viewer tracked and copy the current mcp/viewer assets there when viewer UI changes.

context.fact: docs/viewer was ignored in .gitignore, so changes to the package viewer did not update the GitHub Pages viewer even when docs linked to viewer/. Keep docs/viewer tracked and copy the current mcp/viewer assets there when viewer UI changes.
